concepts.name: Run
concepts.definition: Single playthrough lifecycle covering setup, progression, rewards, and failure.
concepts.boundary: Session-wide progression, salvage economy, milestone tracking, and restart ownership.

concepts.name: GamePhase
concepts.definition: Coordinator phase machine that gates player control, hit stop, rewards, and game over flow.
concepts.boundary: Coordinator phase gates, modal transitions, pause windows, and input routing.

concepts.name: EncounterRoom
concepts.definition: World-authored room identity record that places one encounter into the run sequence.
concepts.boundary: Room id, linear order slot, and grouping identity for one authored encounter room.

concepts.name: EncounterMetadata
concepts.definition: Room-authored descriptive and gameplay knobs projected from world composition into encounter behavior.
concepts.boundary: Modifier labels, build routing tags, bonus knobs, goal selectors, and reinforcement defaults for one room.

concepts.name: StageDefinition
concepts.definition: Room-authored pacing and score envelope projected into a live stage runtime.
concepts.boundary: Stage id, objective label, duration, score target, spawn cadence, alive cap, and reward or enemy budgets.

concepts.name: StageRuntimeState
concepts.definition: Live room metrics tracked while a template is being played.
concepts.boundary: Live room metrics: elapsed clock, score tally, clear rank, and completion marks.

concepts.name: CaptureObjective
concepts.definition: Territory-control objective with progress accumulation and success or failure resolution.
concepts.boundary: Territory progress, resolution flags, control zone thresholds, and capture completion.

concepts.name: PlayerRunState
concepts.definition: Run-persistent player progression values that outlive a single room.
concepts.boundary: Persistent run bonuses, xp totals, salvage currency, and unlocked reward ranks.

concepts.name: PlayerActor
concepts.definition: Controllable combatant represented by an ECS entity plus player-specific combat fields.
concepts.boundary: Controllable fighter entity, locomotion stats, current hp, melee timings, and combo inputs.

concepts.name: EnemyActor
concepts.definition: Hostile pooled combatant with kind-specific behavior, timers, and attack tuning.
concepts.boundary: Pooled hostile entity, ai timers, kind-specific attacks, and defeat reward hooks.

concepts.name: Projectile
concepts.definition: Transient combat carrier for enemy arrows and player homing shots.
concepts.boundary: Transient damage carrier with velocity, lifetime, target selection, and pierce behavior.

concepts.name: SkillFamily
concepts.definition: Named ability lineage used by RogueGame for nova, homing, orbitals, and global upgrades.
concepts.boundary: Named ability lineage for nova, homing, orbitals, and global upgrade branches.

concepts.name: RewardCardSpec
concepts.definition: Offer definition for a rankable upgrade card shown in shops and level-up choices.
concepts.boundary: Offer definition with rarity, rank cap, display copy, xp value, and shop cost.

concepts.name: ShopState
concepts.definition: Current upgrade-offer market state for a run, including rerolls and locked offers.
concepts.boundary: Reroll economy, lock slot, offered cards, purchase readiness, and continue gating.

concepts.name: GameHudState
concepts.definition: Presentation model projected every frame for vitals, skills, stage status, and modal panels.
concepts.boundary: Per-frame presentation model for vitals, skill icons, stage status, and modal panels.

concepts.name: RoomActivationProfile
concepts.definition: Selection rules mapping an encounter room to authored opening, active, and reinforcement source groups inside the world.
concepts.boundary: Selection rules for opening, active, and reinforcement source groups, exclusions, and startup activations.

concepts.name: StagePressureModifier
concepts.definition: Game-specific pressure policy that biases the generic spawn director during a stage.
concepts.boundary: Director bias over credit gain, alive-cap pressure, beat emphasis, and escalation tempo.

concepts.name: ObjectiveSpawnModifier
concepts.definition: Objective-state rule set that changes source eligibility, reinforcement emphasis, and unresolved penalties.
concepts.boundary: Goal-state gating for generators, reserve-wave emphasis, unresolved penalties, and local buffs.
